timeseries.notes: These are currently lightweight dashboard metrics and inferred counts, not a full historical telemetry system. Today is the first real capture day for this view.

timeline.title: Reviewed overnight run
timeline.details: Confirmed Selenium/E2E passed, BACnet discovery was partial, SPARQL parity failed with 401 auth drift, and the expected automated_suite.log was missing.

timeline.title: Scheduled docs/link review and found broken links
timeline.details: Set a docs-check reminder, found a broken live docs link for llm_workflow and a dead canonical prompt GitHub file link.

timeline.title: Professionalized testing repo
timeline.details: Rewrote README, added MIT license, created docs for operational states, overnight review, cloning/porting, context recordkeeping, AI PR review, BACnet graph context, and testing plan.

timeline.title: Set continuous monitoring and nightly review rules
timeline.details: Enabled 10-minute PR checks for open-fdd PR #81 and updated 6 PM-6 AM reminders to include logs, docs/links, branch-aware review, and BACnet/FDD verification expectations.

timeline.title: Added BACnet verification/report structure
timeline.details: Created docs and reports template for overnight BACnet-to-fault verification and opened tracking issue #1 on the testing repo for remaining gaps.

timeline.title: Started progress dashboard
timeline.details: Built a bare-bones dashboard to visualize work completed over the past 24 hours and local/GitHub progress artifacts.

timeline.title: Extended dashboard with 7-day time series
timeline.details: Added default 7-day charts for inferred API activity, Open-FDD local API interactions, raw BACnet RPC requests, context pushes, context-window relapse, and recent log entries.

issue.title: Track remaining overnight BACnet verification and SPARQL auth gaps

recent_commits.message: Add BACnet fault-verification docs and overnight report structure
Expand overnight review to include docs and context gaps
Add README hyperlinks for saved context docs
Trim README and document context recordkeeping
Add AI PR review playbook and overnight log plan

recent_logs: 06:10 Reviewed overnight Open-FDD logs; found partial BACnet discovery and missing automated_suite.log.
07:45 Scheduled docs/link review; confirmed broken README/docs links.
08:20-10:48 Pushed multiple repo context/documentation upgrades to GitHub.
09:03 Enabled continuous PR monitoring for open-fdd PR #81.
10:55 Opened issue #1 on automated-testing repo to track overnight BACnet/SPARQL maturity gaps.
11:32 Started local dashboard server and backed up dashboard code to GitHub.
key_findings: Overnight suite evidence is useful but still needs a durable generated BACnet verification report.
Bench-side authenticated SPARQL access is still a reliability gap for unattended validation.
New container-log feature should be incorporated into overnight diagnostics and UI/backend correlation.
Important context is now being pushed into repo docs instead of left only in chat history.
next_steps: Generate overnight BACnet verification report artifacts automatically.
Make OFDD_API_KEY-backed SPARQL validation reliable from the bench.
Wire container-log correlation into overnight diagnostics.
Continue branch-aware docs/link review on master plus one active dev branch.
